name: ai.voris.mcp/server
title: Voris
description: Connect an AI agent to your Voris privacy-native web analytics: query metrics, conversions, funnels, AI visibility, and citations, and scaffold SDK tracking. A thin stdio-to-HTTPS bridge (npx @voris-ai/mcp) to the hosted Voris MCP server, which enforces per-key scopes and tenant isolation.

environmentVariables.name: VORIS_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your Voris MCP API key. Generate one in the Voris dashboard under Settings > AI Connections.
